author: jaso0n0818
title: Multi-language depth-first matcher miner (Solidity + Rust + Move + Cairo + Go)
notes: Extends the king's proven matcher-shaped depth-first design with per-language file discovery, allocation and prompting so CosmWasm/Rust, Move, and Cairo projects in the curated benchmark are no longer structurally invisible to a Solidity-only scanner, plus threaded concurrency and a higher finding ceiling to use more of the platform's recall budget.
